chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4139 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on CMA No.17011/2025 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.09.2025 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
